title: Bridge Essay: Misidentification syndrome: A narrative review.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ultimate/Emptiness** (Phase 17) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Ultimate/Emptiness to mechanistic neuroscience through Misidentification, syndrome:, A, narrative, review..

**Misidentification syndrome: Anarrative review.** — Ind Psychiatry J. PMID: 41180036. DOI: 10.4103/ipj.ipj_293_24. Misidentification syndromes have been described for along time, but the major developments occurred in the 19th and 29th centuries. Many reviews have discussed the various aspects of delusional misidentification syndromes (DMSs). However, there is alack of updated comprehensive review. This narrative review aims to review the historical aspects, classification, clinical aspects, epidemiology, etiological models, assessment, differential diagnosis, and management of DMS.
